generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis responsible for steering and speed control via motor and servo actuators for the autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components including NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano microcomputers for ACC logic execution"
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Feature element converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for speed control, ensuring compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Feature element responsible for converting steering angle commands into servo actuator movements for vehicle steering control"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor providing real-time speed data for ego vehicle state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring real-time steering angle for vehicle control feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D object detection with point cloud data for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARObjectTracksData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing environmental perception data for object tracking and depth estimation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraObjectTracksData
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Element implementing DBSCAN for point cloud clustering and Kalman filter for object tracking in real-time processing"
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model of the ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle for visualization purposes"
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model representing detected objects with position, velocity, and size data for ACC control logic"
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracksData, DepthCameraObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationPreProcessingFE
]

instance ObjectVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracksData, DepthCameraObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationPreProcessingFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, message serialization, and real-time data exchange between vehicle components and digital twin"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for software development on NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano microcomputers, enabling edge computing capabilities"
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of digital twin components and data processing pipelines"
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ environment with ROS2 node lifecycle management for robust control system implementation"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling including point cloud clustering algorithms"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Element handling data translation between physical and digital twin systems, ensuring compatibility with ISO 23247 standards"
]

instance VisualizationPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Element responsible for preprocessing visualization data, preparing 3D rendering inputs for user interaction"
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Presentation Feature Element managing user interface elements for data visualization and interaction with the digital twin"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control Panel Feature Element enabling remote management of ACC functionality including speed setting and emergency braking triggers"
]

instance DatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for external storage of object tracks and ego vehicle state data"
]

// C11: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D rendering of ego vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving paths via User Interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables PresentationFE
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECU to edge/cloud computing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) to reduce resource constraints"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking via Control Panel User Interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlPanelFE
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data enables dynamic adjustments to ACC speed and braking, improving fuel efficiency and safety through adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataMonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object track data and ego vehicle state inform predictive analytics for brake system and motor health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteDebuggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection and reporting capabilities assist developers in troubleshooting during development phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataMonitoringService
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking triggered remotely via Control Panel FE when safety thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteManagementService
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment based on detected lead vehicle distance and ACC logic processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC functionality through Control Panel interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteManagementService
]

// C17: Environment Components
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, VisualizationPreProcessingFE, PresentationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface entity providing visualization and control capabilities for digital twin interaction"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical vehicle entity hosting lower-level chassis, upper-level autonomy components, and onboard sensors"
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE,
               SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera,
               ROS2Middleware, DatabaseStorage
]

instance CentralizedDataFlow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE,
               SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera,
               PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE, ROS2Middleware, DatabaseStorage
]

// Relationships for Data Flow
SpeedSensor DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedData
SteeringAngleSensor DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARObjectTracksData
IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraObjectTracksData

LiDARObjectTracksData DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
DepthCameraObjectTracksData DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
SpeedData DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
SteeringAngleData DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData

EgoVehicleStateData DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
ObjectTrackData DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
ObjectTrackData DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE
EgoVehicleStateData DTDFVocab:inputTo DrivingPathProjectionData
LiDARObjectTracksData DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectVisualizationData
DepthCameraObjectTracksData DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectVisualizationData

DataTranslationFE DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
DataTranslationFE DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
VisualizationPreProcessingFE DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
PresentationFE DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
ControlPanelFE DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService

DataMonitoringService DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
DataMonitoringService DTDFVocab:provides RemoteDebuggingInsight
ComputationOffloadingService DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
RemoteManagementService DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
RemoteManagementService DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction
RemoteManagementService DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical twin through:
  - **Remote ACC management commands** (enable/disable, set desired speed, emergency braking) via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** transmitted over Wi-Fi.
  - **Computation offloaded ACC logic** (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) executed in the DT Entity, with actuation commands sent back to the vehicle’s motor and steering servos via ROS2 topics, ensuring deterministic response within the 100 ms latency constraint."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with:
  - **Data collection and processing rates**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state updated every perception cycle (~10–30 Hz, depending on sensor resolution).
  - **End-to-end latency**: ≤100 ms (3GPP 22.185 specification) for critical interactions between the DT and physical twin.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices share a global time reference with ±100 ms accuracy (sufficient for distributed systems but not stricter safety-critical standards)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247 adapted):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing (LiDAR/Depth Camera), actuation (motor/servo control), and data pre-processing (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering).
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object tracks, ego state), computation offloading (ACC logic), and reporting (timeseries data generation).
  3. **User Entity**: Provides interfaces for visualization (3D rendering) and remote management (control panel).
  The **Data Translation FE** bridges inter-entity communication via ROS2 (intra-entity) and Wi-Fi (inter-entity)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across all lifecycle stages of the physical twin:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC validation and simulation (e.g., 3D CAD integration for virtual prototyping).
  2. **Manufacturing Phase**: Not directly applicable (PT is a prototype vehicle), but data collection enables post-manufacturing diagnostics.
  3. **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking, speed adjustments) during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: End-to-end latency tests confirm ≤100 ms response time (3GPP 22.185 compliance).
  - **Validation**: ACC logic validated against ISO 15622 for performance class I, with real-time sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera) processed via DBSCAN and Kalman filtering.
  - **Uncertainty Management**: No explicit mention of uncertainty quantification, but real-time data streams and deterministic actuation ensure deterministic behavior.
  - **Model Accuracy**: 3D visualizations and object tracks are derived from high-resolution sensor inputs, though fidelity may vary with scale (1/10th vehicle)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin and digital twin employs:
  - **Communication Protocols**: ROS2 (intra-entity) for low-latency inter-process communication; Wi-Fi (inter-entity) for cloud/edge-to-PT communication.
  - **Network Architecture**: Point-to-point connections between the DT Entity (cloud/edge) and the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano, with data serialized via the **Data Translation FE**.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185), enforced via clock synchronization (±100 ms accuracy)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed on:
  - **Edge Computing**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (for real-time processing of sensor data and ACC logic).
  - **Cloud/Server**: DT Entity (hosting data collection, reporting, and visualization services) deployed externally to the vehicle (due to storage constraints).
  - **Middleware**: ROS2 for inter-component communication, with data flows managed via Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to:
  - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Communication**: The DT supports low-latency interactions with other vehicles (3GPP 22.185 compliance), though no explicit mention of integration with external DTs or IoT systems.
  - **Data Exchange**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state are serialized via the **Data Translation FE** for compatibility with other systems (e.g., cloud platforms)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is unclear in the document but inferred as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Data**: Owned by the vehicle operator/developer, as data is collected for monitoring and remote management purposes.
  - **Digital Twin Data**: Likely shared with the DT service provider (e.g., cloud/edge hosting entity), though no explicit privacy safeguards are mentioned. The system does not address ethical concerns around data usage or anonymization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs, with a modified entity structure (Physical Twin Entity added).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements for performance class I.
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and communication.
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication latency requirements (≤100 ms)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Timing**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms ensures deterministic behavior for ACC actuation, aligning with automotive safety standards.
  - **Remote Management**: Emergency braking commands can be triggered remotely, but no explicit mention of cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) for DT-to-PT communication.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT operates in a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** mode, where operators can intervene via the Control Panel FE. The system does not address potential risks of remote execution on the physical twin (e.g., unintended accidents)."
]
